name: paginate
description: Fetch a single page of FHIR Bundle results using a pagination URL. The url must come from a FHIR Bundle's link array where relation is "next". Do not construct pagination URLs manually — only use links returned by the FHIR server.

url.description: Pagination URL from a FHIR Bundle link[rel=next].url value

fhirpath.description: FHIRPath expression evaluated locally against the FHIR response — use for client-side projection when _elements or _summary are unavailable or insufficient

maxResults.description: Target number of compact results — server stops fetching additional pages once this threshold is reached

prefetch.description: Set to false to disable server-side page coalescing

name: capabilities
description: Returns a summary of the FHIR server's capabilities from /metadata (CapabilityStatement). Shows supported resource types, their interactions, search parameters, and any tools that were skipped. Call this before clinical queries to understand what the server supports. Set refresh=true to re-fetch /metadata from the server.

refresh.description: Re-fetch /metadata from the server before returning the summary

name: terminology_lookup
description: Look up a single medical code in a terminology system and return its display name, version, and properties. Use this when you already have a specific code (e.g. LOINC 2160-0 or SNOMED 73211009) and need to know what it means. system accepts "loinc" or "snomed".

code.description: The code to look up (e.g. "2160-0" for LOINC, "73211009" for SNOMED)

name: code_search
description: Search a terminology system for codes matching a text filter. Use this when you need to find codes by name or description (e.g. "glucose" in LOINC or "myocardial infarction" in SNOMED). Returns matching code/display pairs. LOINC results support paging via offset — increment offset by count to retrieve subsequent pages. system accepts "loinc" or "snomed".

offset.description: Starting position for paged results (default 0). Increment by count for subsequent pages.
